problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bacteriophage. Bacteriophage surface display for targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
